title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud services. By compromising CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code at scale, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruptions, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA) and restricting access to critical systems.
Conduct a comprehensive audit of cloud infrastructure for vulnerabilities and apply security patches where necessary.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor and mitigate ransomware activity in real time.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A vulnerability was identified in TRENDnet TEW-824DRU 1.010B01/1.04B01. The impacted element is...
description: A vulnerability was identified in TRENDnet TEW-824DRU 1.010B01/1.04B01. The impacted element is the function sub_420A78 of the file apply_sec.cgi of the component Web Interface. Such manipulation of the argument Language leads to cross site scripting. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4354.

title: A vulnerability was detected in Portabilis i-Educar 2.11. This impacts an unknown function of the...
description: A vulnerability was detected in Portabilis i-Educar 2.11. This impacts an unknown function of the file /intranet/educar_servidor_curso_lst.php of the component Endpoint. Performing a manipulation of the argument Name results in cross site scripting. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or manipulation of user sessions. Since the exploit is public and the vendor has not responded, the risk of exploitation is elevated.
recommended_actions: Apply input validation and sanitization on the 'Name' parameter to prevent XSS attacks.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests targeting the vulnerable endpoint.
Monitor and update Portabilis i-Educar software regularly, and consider reaching out to the vendor for updates or patches.

title: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0...
description: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0 through 6.2.0.5_1, 6.2.1.0 through 6.2.1.1_1, and 6.2.2.0 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to view and delete the partners of a community and to delete the communities.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1264.

title: Unprotected internal endpoints in Cloud Foundry Capi Release 1.226.0 and below, and CF Deployment...
description: Unprotected internal endpoints in Cloud Foundry Capi Release 1.226.0 and below, and CF Deployment v54.9.0 and below on all platforms allows any user who has bypassed the firewall to potentially replace droplets and therefore applications allowing them to access secure application information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-22727.

title: Vulnerability in the Oracle Edge Cloud Infrastructure Designer and Visualisation Toolkit product...
description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Edge Cloud Infrastructure Designer and Visualisation Toolkit product of Oracle Open Source Projects (component: Desktop).   The supported version that is affected is 0.3.0. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Edge Cloud Infrastructure Designer and Visualisation Toolkit.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of Oracle Edge Cloud Infrastructure Designer and Visualis

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-21994.

title: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain an authentication bypass...
description: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to access the management interface. Attackers can exploit the global authentication flag mechanism to gain administrative access without credentials after any user authenticates, enabling unauthorized password changes, firmware uploads, and configuration modifications.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The authentication bypass vulnerability in Edimax GS-5008PL firmware allows attackers to gain unauthorized administrative access, potentially leading to unauthorized password changes, firmware uploads, and configuration modifications. This could result in network compromise, data breaches, and disruption of operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware to the latest version if a patch is available from the vendor.
Restrict access to the management interface by implementing network segmentation and access control lists (ACLs).
Monitor network activity for unauthorized access attempts and implement intrusion detection/prevention systems to identify potential exploitation.

title: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0...
description: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0 through 6.2.0.5_1, 6.2.1.0 through 6.2.1.1_1, and 6.2.2.0 could allow an unauthenticated attacker to send a specially crafted request that causes the application to crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and IBM Sterling File Gateway could allow an unauthenticated attacker to crash the application by sending a specially crafted request. This could lead to denial of service (DoS), disrupting critical business processes and data exchanges.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest security patches or updates provided by IBM for the affected versions.
Implement network-level protections, such as Web Application Firewalls (WAFs), to filter and block malicious requests.
Monitor application logs for unusual activity or signs of exploitation and establish an incident response plan to address potential attacks.

title: A vulnerability was determined in Duende IdentityServer 4. The affected element is an unknown...
description: A vulnerability was determined in Duende IdentityServer 4. The affected element is an unknown function of the file /connect/authorize of the component Token Renewal Endpoint. This manipulation of the argument id_token_hint causes improper authentication. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The attack is considered to have high complexity. The exploitability is described as difficult. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4349.

title: IBM Planning Analytics Local 2.1.0 through 2.1.17 could allow an unauthorized access to sensitive...
description: IBM Planning Analytics Local 2.1.0 through 2.1.17 could allow an unauthorized access to sensitive application data and administrative functionalities due to lack of proper access controls.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1267.

title: A cross-origin issue in the Navigation API was addressed with improved input validation. This...
description: A cross-origin issue in the Navigation API was addressed with improved input validation. This issue is fixed in Background Security Improvements for iOS 26.3.1, iPadOS 26.3.1, macOS 26.3.1, and macOS 26.3.2. Processing maliciously crafted web content may bypass Same Origin Policy.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Navigation API could allow attackers to bypass the Same Origin Policy, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data or execution of malicious scripts. This poses a significant risk to user privacy and data integrity.
recommended_actions: Immediately update all affected devices to iOS 26.3.1, iPadOS 26.3.1, macOS 26.3.1, or macOS 26.3.2 to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit of web applications to ensure compliance with Same Origin Policy and identify potential exploitation vectors.
Educate employees and users on the importance of applying software updates promptly to reduce exposure to known vulnerabilities.

title: IBM Db2 Recovery Expert for Linux, UNIX and Windows 5.5 IF 2 could allow an attacker to modify or...
description: IBM Db2 Recovery Expert for Linux, UNIX and Windows 5.5 IF 2 could allow an attacker to modify or corrupt data due to an insecure mechanism used for verifying the integrity of the data during transmission.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3856.

title: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain a cross-site request forgery...
description: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows remote attackers to perform unauthorized administrative actions by inducing logged-in administrators to visit malicious pages. Attackers can exploit the lack of anti-CSRF tokens and request validation to change passwords, upload firmware, reboot the device, perform factory resets, or modify network configurations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to perform unauthorized administrative actions on Edimax GS-5008PL devices by exploiting logged-in administrators. This can lead to unauthorized changes in network configurations, firmware uploads, and potential denial of service, impacting network security and stability.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware to a patched version if available or contact the vendor for a fix.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems and limit exposure.
Educate administrators to avoid visiting untrusted websites while logged into the device's management interface.

title: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain an insecure credential storage...
description: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain an insecure credential storage vulnerability that allows attackers to obtain administrator credentials by accessing configuration backup files. Attackers can download the config.bin file through fupload.cgi to extract plaintext username and password fields for unauthorized administrative access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32842.

title: IBM Planning Analytics Local 2.1.0 through 2.1.17 could allow an attacker to trick the caching...
description: IBM Planning Analytics Local 2.1.0 through 2.1.17 could allow an attacker to trick the caching mechanism into storing and serving sensitive, user-specific responses as publicly cacheable resources.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-14806.

title: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain a stored cross-site scripting...
description: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior contain a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the system_name_set.cgi script that allows attackers to inject arbitrary script code by manipulating the sysName parameter. Attackers can send a crafted POST request with malicious script payload that executes when management pages including system_data.js are viewed by administrators.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32840.

title: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior use cleartext HTTP for the web management...
description: Edimax GS-5008PL firmware version 1.00.54 and prior use cleartext HTTP for the web management interface without implementing TLS or SSL encryption. Attackers on the same network can intercept management traffic to capture administrator credentials and sensitive configuration data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The use of cleartext HTTP for the web management interface exposes administrator credentials and sensitive configuration data to interception by attackers on the same network. This could lead to unauthorized access, configuration changes, or further exploitation of the device and network.
recommended_actions: Immediately restrict access to the web management interface to trusted IP addresses using network-level access controls.
Update the firmware to a version that supports HTTPS or implement a reverse proxy with TLS/SSL encryption to secure the management interface.
Educate administrators to avoid using unsecured networks when accessing the device and monitor network traffic for suspicious activity.

title: IBM i 7.6 could allow a remote attacker to cause a denial of service using failed authentication...
description: IBM i 7.6 could allow a remote attacker to cause a denial of service using failed authentication connections due to improper allocation of resources.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1376.

title: Improper trust boundary enforcement in Kiro IDE before version 0.8.0 on all supported platforms...
description:
Improper trust boundary enforcement in Kiro IDE before version 0.8.0 on all supported platforms might allow a remote unauthenticated threat actor to execute arbitrary code via maliciously crafted project directory files that bypass workspace trust protections when a local user opens the directory.



To remediate this issue, users should upgrade to version 0.8.0 or higher.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code by exploiting improper trust boundary enforcement. This could lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, or system compromise when users open maliciously crafted project directories.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Kiro IDE to version 0.8.0 or higher immediately to mitigate the vulnerability.
Educate users on the risks of opening untrusted project directories and implement policies to restrict such actions.
Perform a security audit of systems using Kiro IDE to detect any signs of compromise or exploitation.

title: A compromised third party cloud server or man-in-the-middle attacker could send a malformed HTTP...
description: A compromised third party cloud server or man-in-the-middle attacker could send a malformed HTTP response and cause a crash in applications using the MongoDB C driver.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4359.

title: Missing authorization checks on multiple gRPC service endpoints in PowerShell Universal before...
description: Missing authorization checks on multiple gRPC service endpoints in PowerShell Universal before 2026.1.4 allows an authenticated user with any valid token to bypass role-based access controls and perform privileged operations — including reading sensitive data, creating or deleting resources, and disrupting service operations — via crafted gRPC requests.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users with any valid token to bypass role-based access controls, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data, resource manipulation, and service disruption. This could severely compromise the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of affected systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update PowerShell Universal to version 2026.1.4 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Review and audit gRPC service endpoint configurations to ensure proper authorization checks are in place.
Monitor logs for any suspicious activity related to gRPC requests and revoke any potentially compromised tokens.

title: CVE-2026-27237 - Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (
description: Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that could be abused by a low-privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts into vulnerable form fields. Malicious JavaScript may be executed in a victim’s browser when they browse to the page containing the vulnerable field.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-27237.

title: CVE-2026-27236 - Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (
description: Adobe Experience Manager versions 6.5.23 and earlier are affected by a stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that could be abused by a low-privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts into vulnerable form fields. Malicious JavaScript may be executed in a victim’s browser when they browse to the page containing the vulnerable field.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The stored XSS vulnerability in Adobe Experience Manager could allow attackers to inject malicious scripts into web pages, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or defacement of web pages. This could harm user trust and compromise sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Update Adobe Experience Manager to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement input validation and sanitization for all form fields to prevent malicious script injection.
Conduct a security audit of web applications to identify and remediate other potential XSS vulnerabilities.

title: CVE-2026-2569 - The Dear Flipbook – PDF Flipbook, 3D Flipbook, PDF embed, PDF viewer plugin for WordPress is vulnera
description: The Dear Flipbook – PDF Flipbook, 3D Flipbook, PDF embed, PDF viewer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via PDF page labels in all versions up to, and including, 2.4.20 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2569.
